# City Radio Native Backend Third-Party Dependencies

This directory contains the external source dependencies needed to build the vehicle radio native backend.

- `godot-cpp/`
  - Added as a git submodule pinned in repository history.
  - Source: `https://github.com/godotengine/godot-cpp`
  - For the current Godot `4.6` project baseline, the integration uses the upstream `master` branch commit recorded by the submodule.

Planned M6 follow-up:

- Add a reproducible Windows FFmpeg development dependency path.
- Keep the FFmpeg build surface LGPL-only.
